title: Test HubSpot Connection on DataTools Pro v2
description: Validate HubSpot OAuth connection on DataTools Pro v2. This involves creating a HubSpot developer account, setting up an authentication app to obtain client ID and secret, adding the new callback URL for v2, and verifying the end-to-end connection flow.
acceptance_criteria: HubSpot OAuth connection works on DataTools Pro v2
Developer account with authentication app is configured
Callback URL is updated for v2 environment
middleware_changes: Updated HubSpot OAuth callback URL for v2 environment.
implementation_notes: Created a new HubSpot developer account, added authentication app, configured client ID/secret, and updated callback URL for v2. Connection tested and working.
comment_summary: Developer tested the HubSpot connection on v2 by creating a developer account, configuring OAuth credentials, and verifying the flow works as expected.
